items.title: Wayanad debris slip: Priyanka Gandhi to visit Kalladi, meet injured victims on July 25
items.summary: Wayanad MP’s visit comes amid criticism from political opponents, including CPI(M) and BJP, who have questioned her absence in the immediate aftermath of the disaster on July 7

items.title: Tens of thousands evacuated from French tourist spot as wildfires spread
items.summary: The fire has raged in the region for several days with officials now ordering the evacuation of the entire Cap Ferret peninsula.
